questions.question: What do I get if I sign up for the NUST Special Mega Bonus Account?
questions.answer: The NUST Special Mega Bonus Account is a limited-time exclusive offer designed for high-value customers. Key benefits include: Complimentary world-class credit card with premium benefits, Exclusive access to investment products at preferential rates, Dedicated relationship manager for personalized banking experience, Cashback rewards on all transactions (up to 5%), Free travel insurance for international trips, Complimentary airport lounge access worldwide, and most importantly - a FREE BICYCLE upon account opening! Plus enjoy free annual membership renewal for 3 years.

questions.question: What are the eligibility criteria for the Special Mega Bonus Account?
questions.answer: Eligibility for NUST Special Mega Bonus Account: Resident Pakistani individuals, Minimum age 21 years, Valid CNIC (Computerized National Identity Card), Proof of address, Minimum monthly balance Rs. 500,000, Annual income minimum Rs. 2,000,000 or equivalent business revenue.
